title: Camp Cobblemon Sash
description: Adds a wearable sash that can store and display up to 18 items in front of your chest! Some sample badges included.
body: ## NOW WORKS WITH FRESH ANIMATIONS! # General - Adds a Sash item and a new "Sling" trinkets slot. - Stores up to 18 items of any type. All items take up a separate slot in the sash. - Items are rendered in two rows of 9 lining the sash. - Can also be dyed. This mod comes bundled with Undye-ing features, so you can bleach dyeable items with a water bucket. - Using this with the [bundle backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/bundle-backportish) mod is recommended. # Recipe ![Sash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5635e9e93583503b9aab007400db360ad1fd77c0.png) - Cookie badge: 1 cookie - Navigation badge: 1 compass - First aid badge: 1 glistening melon slice - Rainbow badge: black, brown, red, yellow, orange, blue, green, purple, pink dyes # Final notes - Join the discord to report bugs and suggest features and ports.
